title: Regional Offices of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration
content: This section lists the regional offices, regional extension units, and satellite offices of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) across Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao. It provides addresses, contact telephone and telefax numbers, and email addresses for each office. The offices serve as points of contact for overseas employment matters under the POEA.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
